titleStmt.title: SII 25.144: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 144. (A.R. No. 144 of 1908.) KUḶḶAPUṞAM, PERIYAKULAM TALUK, MADURAI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the central shrine in the Sundararājaperumāḷ temple.
This damaged inscription purports to ba a copy of the king's order (tirumugam) issued in the month of Tai in the above regnal year.

It seems to record the grant of lands including the tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam lands of the god and the income from taxes for the persons serving in the temple of Maṅgaladēva-viṇṇagar-emberumāṉ, the temple in the west of the village [Rāja*]chūḍāmaṇi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Aḷa-nāḍu. It is further stated that the gift was made as iṟaiyili for conducting the festival named Āṇmaiyaḻagiyāṉ-tirunāḷ named after Āṇmaiyaḻagiyān, and for the food-offerings made on this day instituted for the welfare of the king.
The document was attested by a number of signatories. Some of these officials are referred to in a record of the same date from this place discussed above (A.R.Ep., 1908, No. 143).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭuṅkoṇṭu
rattu virābhi[ṣekampaṇ]ṇiyaruḷiṉa śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉeḻāvatiṉ Etir
ṇṭu tāmmāsa ṟaiyiliṭṭut tantaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi Aruḷic ceyal Aḷanāṭṭu
cūṭāmaṇiccaṟuppeti maṅkalattut tirumeṟkoyil maṅkalatteva viṇṇakaremperu
yāṟkaḷukkum ppāṟkum Ivvemperumāṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam nilam kaṇṇaṉ
lum meṟ ciṟumaṭaiyiluṅ kuḷattilum kiḻ mayaṟkkālilum muṭiko
yili nilam Aiñcumāvum nā veṭṭuvittu muṉṟumā
k kaṭaiya Āṇmaiyaḻakiya nilam Irupatteṭṭu patiṉe
ḻāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mutal Ukavai Iṟukkavum kaḷ Ukavai Oṉṟu pāti
Antarāyam kāval vaṇṇa Ūr muṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum
liyāka nirvāṟtut tantom Au ṭikaik kolāl piṟanta nāḷ koyilile nammai prasādikkum pa
ṇmai yaḻakiyāṉ tirunāḷāka Eḻu kkavum Ippaṭi Eḻuntaruḷun tirunā viñcaṉaṅkaḷ Uṭpaṭa
veṇkalamum nittal nimantap ḻakkum nimantakkāṟar Uṭpaṭa Eppeṟpaṭṭa pala viñcaṉa
aiñnūṟṟu nāṟpatiṉ ka kallut tiruppaṇi koṇṭu Ippaṭi cantirāti
luñcempilum veṭṭikka . Ivai Aḻakiya
yaka bhaṭṭaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉāṉa tuvārapatiIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 25.144 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
